name: mimetic
description: An MCP that learns your design system. Translates HTML into Figma using your published components and design tokens — and compounds over time. Every run teaches Mimetic your DS vocabulary: by run 10, familiar patterns resolve instantly with near-zero library lookups. Your corrections teach it too.

tools.name: mimetic_knowledge_read
tools.description: Load known pattern→component mappings before a run. VERIFIED entries skip DS lookup entirely.

tools.name: mimetic_knowledge_write
tools.description: Persist pattern mappings after a run. Auto-promotes CANDIDATE→VERIFIED at 3 consistent uses.

tools.name: figma_insert_component
tools.description: Insert a published library component instance into a Figma frame

tools.name: figma_create_frame
tools.description: Create an auto-layout frame with design token variable bindings

tools.name: figma_create_text
tools.description: Create a text node bound to a DS text style and color variable

tools.name: figma_create_rectangle
tools.description: Create a rectangle bound to a DS color variable

tools.name: figma_create_chart
tools.description: Render a chart (scatter, line, donut, bar) in a single call

tools.name: figma_batch
tools.description: Execute multiple Figma operations in a single round trip

tools.name: figma_set_component_text
tools.description: Set a text property on a component instance

tools.name: figma_set_node_fill
tools.description: Apply a DS color variable to any node

tools.name: figma_set_layout_sizing
tools.description: Adjust sizing, alignment, padding, or dimensions on a node

tools.name: figma_set_variant
tools.description: Set a variant or boolean property on a component instance

tools.name: figma_set_visibility
tools.description: Show or hide a Figma node

tools.name: figma_swap_main_component
tools.description: Swap a component instance to a different variant

tools.name: figma_replace_component
tools.description: Replace a node with a new component at the same position

tools.name: figma_move_node
tools.description: Reorder a node within its parent

tools.name: figma_delete_node
tools.description: Delete a node from the Figma document

tools.name: figma_get_node_props
tools.description: Get component properties and text layers for a node

tools.name: figma_get_node_children
tools.description: List direct children of a node

tools.name: figma_get_node_parent
tools.description: Get parent and siblings of a node

tools.name: figma_get_text_info
tools.description: Get DS text style and color variable of a text node

tools.name: figma_list_text_styles
tools.description: List all DS text styles with their IDs

tools.name: figma_get_component_variants
tools.description: List all variant options in a component set

tools.name: figma_get_selection
tools.description: Get currently selected node IDs and dimensions

tools.name: figma_select_node
tools.description: Select and zoom to a node by ID

tools.name: figma_get_page_nodes
tools.description: List all top-level nodes on the current page

tools.name: figma_get_pages
tools.description: List all pages in the document

tools.name: figma_change_page
tools.description: Switch to a different page in the Figma document
